1792060.name: Steel Ball Race
1792060.description:
Welcome to Steel Ball Race where you can create your character and customize it with different outfits. Get ready to explore the rugged terrain on horseback.

As you progress through the game, you will gain experience and level up your abilities to become a more experienced rider and fighter. But that's not all, as you progress through the game you will come across different fighting spirits that you can harness and use to help in battles.

The plot of the game is unique and mysterious, it features a variety of characters, each with their own motives and secrets. As you explore the world, you will come across several unique maps that have their own mysteries and hidden secrets. Solve these puzzles to discover powerful artifacts that will reward you with various spirits that will help you on your journey and help you in your battles.

But be careful, your decisions in the game will have consequences. Choose carefully your decisions in the game, as your actions will affect the future of the Story.

In the Wild West, danger is always lurking around the corner, so make sure you're ready to face bandits and criminals at every turn. With your trusty horse and fighting spirit at your side, you'll be ready to take on any challenge that comes your way.

So get in the saddle and get ready to go on an exciting adventure in the Wild West!
1792060.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
